today

What was good about today’s lesson?

comment
It’s great.
I could speak English fluently.
I knew a lot of friends’ opinions. It was interesting.
A lot of talking
I joined discussions actively.
I can talk about many kinds of topic.
i talked a lot
Bond with friends has gone strong
Not only discussion leaders ask questions to participants, participants also ask questions each other.
Last topic was so interesting. We can communicate with each other and know others opinion.
In a while I do not have opportunity to speak English but I eager to do discussion
I can tell my friends to my opinion.
It was fun to have a discussion for the first time in two weeks.
I listened carefully and tell my opinion to others.
I was able to think more deeply than usual and try to say things that were difficult to say.
I enjoyed listening other’s experience.
I talked about the topic with gesture
I could communicate well.
We speak a lot theme.
I can talk about many academic topic.
comment
